machine.name: Community Command Agent
machine.description: Meta-CES — orchestrates a referral workflow across community-services leaf machines.  Its 'inputs' are event-bus bits latched by the engine when {benefits-eligibility, intake-triage, housing-placement} sequences fire.  Asserts referral-complete when all three milestones have fired in order.

compose.description: Each subscription latches `1.0` at bitOffset in the perceptual space whenever the producer's sequence fires.  The meta-machine's perceptualMapping.input region covers those bits, so the meta-CES sees fire-events as ordinary input.

governance.notes: Auto-backfilled by scripts/backfill-governance.mjs from primaryDomain="community-services".  Review and tune the routing as the team owning CommunityCommandAgent matures.

rules.description: All three milestones (benefits, intake, housing) have been confirmed.  Hand off to case management.
No milestones latched yet — workflow not started.

sequences.name: Referral completion — all three milestones latched

metadata.description: The meta-CES asserts referral-complete once {benefits-eligible.fired, intake-complete.fired, housing-placed.fired} have all been latched on the event bus.  Latching is monotonic — once a producer fires, the bit stays 1 until the simulator is reset — so this conjunction terminates the workflow regardless of arrival order.  Order discipline (benefits → intake → housing) is enforced upstream by the producer agents, not by the meta-CES.

metadata.label: REFERRAL_COMPLETE
metadata.description: All three milestones (benefits, intake, housing) have been confirmed.  Hand off to case management.

Continuously asserts that referral is NOT complete (terminal value [0,1,0,0]) while at least one milestone is unmet.  Pairs with the referral-completion sequence on the same output region — final write wins per merge ordering, so once all three latch, REFERRAL_COMPLETE supersedes.

metadata.label: REFERRAL_PENDING
metadata.description: No milestones latched yet — workflow not started.

inputSequences.name: No milestones — referral not started
inputSequences.description: All three event-bus bits are unlatched. Machine asserts REFERRAL_PENDING immediately.

inputSequences.name: Benefits eligible only — first milestone latched
inputSequences.description: Only the benefits-eligibility bit is set. Intake and housing are still pending; referral remains incomplete.

inputSequences.name: Benefits + intake — two of three milestones
inputSequences.description: Benefits-eligibility and intake-triage have fired. Housing placement is still outstanding; referral remains incomplete.

inputSequences.name: All milestones latched — referral complete
inputSequences.description: All three event-bus bits are set simultaneously. Machine asserts REFERRAL_COMPLETE.

inputSequences.name: Full workflow progression — none through completion
inputSequences.description: Replays the nominal happy-path: workflow starts with no milestones, benefits fires first, intake second, housing last. Final vector asserts REFERRAL_COMPLETE.
